instructions.title: Verify power source is disconnected
instructions.details: Confirm the main breaker is in the OFF position and the lockout tag is applied before proceeding. Do not rely on indicator lights alone.

instructions.title: Inspect housing for visible damage
instructions.details: Check the outer casing for cracks, deformation, or impact marks. Pay attention to seams and mounting points.

instructions.title: Check fluid levels against the gauge
instructions.details: Reading must sit between the MIN and MAX marks with the unit level. Top up with approved fluid only if below MIN.

instructions.title: Record inspection in the logbook
instructions.details: Enter date, time, operator ID, and any anomalies observed. Sign and store the entry.
